description: Pins the shared region/label validation (behind confirm) and the access POST body. Every case carries confirm:true because the confirm-gate message text diverges.

cases.name: rejects an invalid acl
cases.expect_error: acl must be one of: private, public-read, authenticated-read, public-read-write

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation changes bucket access controls. Set confirm=true to proceed.
